title: The Track-2 build-bundle handoff artifact Skill 6 reads (PRD §5.2)
description: The funnel-manifest.json contract. Skill 56 authors it; Skill 6 consumes it. Validated fail-closed by prove_sp_bundle.py. Every asset key follows the labeling grammar (structure/labeling-grammar.json); NO model names in any label (rule R1).

fields.location_id: GHL sub-account / location id — Skill 6 sub-account gate REFUSES on mismatch

seo.founder_name: first_name + last_name — validate_founder_name HALTs the build if absent

media.cdn_map: asset_key -> GHL media CDN URL (every must resolve to the GHL media host — assert_images_are_ghl_media, ghl_rest_canvas.py:603)

step_shape.stage: one of the labeling stage vocabulary (main/upsell-1/downsell-1/high-ticket/bump/thank-you/...)
step_shape.fragment_path: pages/<asset key>.fragment.html — REQUIRED for PAGE steps (naked fragment; a full <!DOCTYPE html> renders blank). NOT required for the bump step.
step_shape.method_decision: Phase-5 classifier inputs -> {classification, route}; route in {DIRECT, VERCEL_EMBED, SKILL44_WIDGET}. REQUIRED for PAGE steps.
step_shape.copy_tokens: per-page approved-phrase list (ghl_verify.verify_page fidelity) — this OR copy_md_path
step_shape.route: for the bump step: SKILL44_WIDGET (order-bump element on a GHL order form; Skill 44 creates the product/order-form object first)

notes.bump: The bump step is COPY, not a page — route SKILL44_WIDGET; no fragment_path. The P4->P5 board handoff (page_ids + form_ids + funnel_template_id + linked_automations) hands the built funnel to Skill 44 for workflow wiring.
notes.thank_you: A thank-you step is MANDATORY (every funnel Skill 6 builds terminates on a thank-you page). No offer CTA; utility buttons only.
notes.ab_variants: Both a/b variants of main + upsell-1 ship in the bundle; the manifest marks which installs (the twin stays available for a split test).
notes.publish: Delivery is preview-only; publish happens ONLY after explicit human approval.
